title: alnus × elliptica
intro: Alnus × elliptica, also known as the Green Alder or Red Alder, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between the Alnus glutinosa and Alnus incana. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Alnus × elliptica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to treat a range of conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
